title: Fastium (Ultra Fast)
description: Extreme amount of optimization that doesn't affect visuals
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d43a3429b2e58ae8c608d800654a9873f07be9.png)

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BbkAQ_vHNtA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BbkAQ_vHNtA)


**Important**

**There is a VULKAN version that replaces some mods, THIS VERSION IS AN EXPERIMENTAL VERSION THAT USES VULKAN INSTEAD OF SODIUM, IT INCREASES FPS BUT HAS NO SHADER SUPORT AND IT MAY NEED RELATIVE NEW GPUS**

**In beta versions there may be some unactive mods, if you enable them your game may crash**

**Older versions may have some utility or decoration modifications, while newer ones only focus on performance. These changes are made from 1.21**

**What?**

Incredibly Optimized experience with some non game chanaging stuff, zoom, bug fixes and too many FPS

**Why?**

Made by an optimization paranoic for optimization paranoics

**How much performance?**

**Up to 1500 FPS** at 32 render distance 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_on an rtx 3060 at 1080p with opened browser and windoed mode_

</details>

It includes zoom, some hunger and shulkerbox info, texture and model compatibilizers, and borderless fullscreen.

**Shaders and stuff?**

It includes shader loader and resource pack compatibilizers for resource packs with models or animations

**THE MOD CONTAINS A DYNAMYC LIGHT THAT MAY LAG ON BAD DEVICES, YOU CAN UNABLE IT FROM THE GAME OR DELETING THE MOD LAMBDYNAMICLIGHTS**
